blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
